name: AWS SageMaker Notebook Instance Configured With Admin Role
description: Assignment of an IAM role with administrative privileges to an Amazon SageMaker notebook instance, either during creation or update, poses a significant security risk. This activity may allow unauthorized users to perform privileged actions, potentially leading to privilege escalation. Close monitoring of such role assignments is essential to safeguard critical resources and maintain a secure AWS environment.

rules.name: AWS SageMaker Notebook Instance Configured With Admin Role

author: Sunil Bharti and Yash Verma
